title: Verify @archmap/icons 0.1.1 CDN sample
description: The static browser demo now imports @archmap/icons v0.1.1 through jsDelivr, and the local dev dependency is aligned to the same package version.
decision_notes: Confirmed @archmap/icons@0.1.1 is published on npm with an ESM export at ./dist/index.js.
Updated examples/demo.html importmap to use the 0.1.1 CDN module.
Updated the local devDependency and lockfile to @archmap/icons ^0.1.1 for parity with the CDN sample.
Updated README icon guidance now that @archmap/icons v0.1.1 is available on npm/CDN.
verification: npm view @archmap/icons@0.1.1 name version exports main module types --json
node --input-type=module import of @archmap/icons confirmed cloudIconCounts and famousServiceIconEntries
Browser check at http://127.0.0.1:4174/examples/demo.html confirmed importmap uses @archmap/icons@0.1.1/+esm and rendered GCP/AWS/Datadog/Wiz icon symbols from the icon pack.
